question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Visit the Self-Service Password Portal at passwords.boldagent.com. Click 'Forgot Password', enter your employee ID, and follow the instructions sent to your registered recovery email. If you're locked out of that too, contact IT Helpdesk at ext. 2020 or it-helpdesk@boldagent.com.

question: How often do I need to change my password?
answer: Passwords are rotated every 90 days. The system prompts you 7 days before expiry. Passwords must be at least 12 characters with one number and one special character.

question: How do I connect to the VPN?
answer: Download the GlobalProtect client from software.boldagent.com/vpn, enter portal address vpn.boldagent.com, log in with your SSO credentials, and approve the MFA push notification on your phone.

question: The VPN says 'certificate error', what do I do?
answer: This usually means your system clock is out of sync. Enable automatic time sync in your OS settings and reconnect.

question: My VPN MFA push keeps timing out.
answer: The MFA push notification expires after 60 seconds. Request a new push and respond promptly when it arrives.

question: Does VPN work on Linux?
answer: Yes, via OpenConnect. The official GlobalProtect GUI client is not supported on Linux — see the internal wiki page 'VPN — Linux' for CLI setup instructions.

question: How do I request a software licence?
answer: Standard approved software (Slack, Zoom, VS Code, Chrome, Office 365) is self-install via the Company Portal app. For anything else, submit a request through IT Helpdesk with business justification; paid licences over $50/year also need manager approval.

question: How do I set up MFA?
answer: On first login you'll be prompted to install the Okta Verify app and scan a QR code to link your device. MFA is mandatory for all BoldAgent accounts.

question: I got a new phone, how do I reset my MFA device?
answer: Use the 'Lost my device' option on the Okta login page, or contact IT Helpdesk. You'll need to verify your identity via your manager or HR before MFA is reset.

question: How do visitors connect to Wi-Fi?
answer: Visitors use the 'BoldAgent-Guest' network with the daily password posted at each office reception desk. It rotates every 24 hours and is isolated from internal systems.

question: Can I use Guest Wi-Fi for work?
answer: No, employees should use the 'BoldAgent-Corp' network or VPN instead of Guest Wi-Fi, which is isolated from internal systems.

question: How do I set up email on my phone?
answer: Install the Gmail app and sign in with your BoldAgent email. This automatically enforces MFA and device compliance (screen lock, remote wipe). The native iOS Mail app is not supported because it can't enforce these policies.

question: My laptop screen is broken, what do I do?
answer: Report hardware issues to IT Helpdesk with your asset tag number (on a sticker on the bottom of your laptop). A loaner laptop is available if the fix will take longer than one business day.

question: How do I request a new software installation not in the catalog?
answer: Submit a request through IT Helpdesk with a business justification. Requests are reviewed within 2 business days; paid licences over $50/year also require manager approval.

question: How many sick leaves do I get per year?
answer: 8 sick leave days per year. A doctor's note is required for absences longer than 2 consecutive days.

question: How many casual leaves per year?
answer: 12 casual leave days per year, accrued monthly at 1 day/month. Requires at least 24 hours notice for short personal matters.

question: How much paid time off (PTO) do I get?
answer: 15 days of Earned Leave (PTO) per year, accrued monthly. Requests must be submitted at least 5 business days in advance via the HR portal.

question: Can I carry forward unused leave to next year?
answer: Up to 10 days of unused Earned Leave can carry forward to the next calendar year. Casual and Sick leave do not carry forward. Earned Leave beyond the 10-day cap is encashed at year-end at your daily base salary rate.

question: What is the maternity leave policy?
answer: 26 weeks, fully paid, exceeding FMLA minimums.

question: What is the paternity leave policy?
answer: 2 weeks, fully paid, to be taken within 3 months of the child's birth or adoption.

question: What is the WFH policy?
answer: BoldAgent is hybrid: in-office Tuesday–Thursday, flexible WFH Monday and Friday. Fully remote arrangements need manager and HR Business Partner approval, reviewed quarterly. WFH employees must be reachable during core hours (10 AM–4 PM CT).

question: How do I submit a reimbursement?
answer: Submit receipts via the Expensify portal linked from the HR intranet within 30 days of the expense. Reimbursements process with the next payroll cycle, typically within 10 business days. Expenses over $500 need pre-approval before purchase.

question: How do I report a code of conduct violation?
answer: Report to HR or via the anonymous ethics hotline at ethics.boldagent.com. The full Code of Conduct is on the HR intranet under 'Policies > Ethics'.

question: How do I report harassment?
answer: Report to HR, your manager, or the anonymous ethics hotline. All reports are investigated confidentially and retaliation against good-faith reporters is strictly prohibited.

question: When are performance reviews?
answer: Twice a year: a mid-year check-in in June and an annual review in December, which determines merit increases and bonuses. Reviews use a self-assessment + manager assessment + calibration process.

question: Can I work fully remote?
answer: Fully remote arrangements require manager and HR Business Partner approval and are reviewed quarterly — the default model is hybrid (in-office Tuesday–Thursday).

question: What do I do on my first day?
answer: Report to reception by 9 AM for your building badge, meet your onboarding buddy, and attend New Hire Orientation (10 AM–12 PM) covering company overview, benefits, and IT setup. Your manager covers your first-week schedule in your 1:1.

question: When do I get my laptop?
answer: Remote new hires get laptops shipped 5 business days before their start date. Office-based hires receive it in person on day one. Request your preference (MacBook Pro 14" or Windows Dell Latitude) during pre-boarding via the New Hire Portal.

question: How do I get a monitor for my home office?
answer: Submit the 'Home Office Equipment' form at least 10 business days before your start date to guarantee delivery in time.

question: How do I enrol in insurance?
answer: You have 30 days from your start date to enroll in health, dental, and vision via benefits.boldagent.com. Coverage is retroactive to day one regardless of when you complete enrollment within the window.

question: When can I enroll in the 401k?
answer: Anytime after 30 days of employment. BoldAgent matches 4% of contributions.

question: What is the buddy programme?
answer: Every new hire is paired with a peer buddy (not your manager) from a different team for the first 60 days, to help with informal questions and team norms. Assignments are made by People Ops and shared in your welcome email.

question: How long is the probation period?
answer: 90 days. Either party may end employment during this period with 2 weeks' notice. There's a 30-day check-in and a formal 90-day review.

question: Who assigns my onboarding buddy?
answer: The People Ops team makes buddy assignments and communicates them in your welcome email.

question: When is payday?
answer: Semi-monthly: the 15th and the last business day of each month. If a date falls on a weekend or holiday, payment is issued the preceding business day. Direct deposit typically lands by 9 AM CT.

question: How do I submit my tax declaration?
answer: Submit W-4 elections during onboarding via payroll.boldagent.com. You can update withholding anytime; changes take effect the following pay cycle. W-2s are available electronically by January 31st.

question: How does stock option vesting work?
answer: 4-year vesting with a 1-year cliff: 25% vests on the first anniversary, then the remaining 75% vests monthly over the next 36 months. Leaving before the 1-year cliff means no equity vests. Vested but unexercised options must be exercised within 90 days of departure, subject to your specific grant agreement.

question: What is BoldAgent's salary structure?
answer: A leveled structure: L1–L7 for individual contributors, M1–M5 for management, with salary bands published on the Compensation Philosophy page of the HR intranet. Merit increases tie to the December review cycle; band adjustments are reviewed annually in Q1.

question: What happens to my unvested equity if I leave before one year?
answer: No equity vests if you leave before the 1-year cliff.
